title: Turk Dil Kurumu Guncel Turkce Sozluk: yol

note.en: Inspected for the Turkish word yol only: the entry shows that yol has a broad route/distance field and lists sirat/tarik as related equivalents.
note.tr: Yalnizca Turkce yol sozunun kullanimi icin incelendi: madde yolun genis yol/mesafe alanini gosterir ve sirat/tarik karsiliklarini verir.

transliteration.en: ṣ-r-ṭ
transliteration.tr: ṣ-r-ṭ

overview.en: The root envelope ص ر ط (ṣ-r-ṭ) contains three frozen branches. One is the familiar road/path sense, especially a straight road; the other two preserve Maqayis material connected with س ر ط (s-r-ṭ): disappearance in passage by swallowing, and a specialized use of السراط (al-surāṭ) for a cutting sword. The branches are kept separate because the evidence separates the road, ingestion, and sword applications even where Maqayis places them near one another.
overview.tr: ص ر ط (ṣ-r-ṭ) kok zarfinda uc dondurulmus dal vardir. Biri bilinen yol anlamidir, ozellikle dogru yol; oteki ikisi Maḳâyîs'in س ر ط (s-r-ṭ) malzemesini korur: yutmayla geciste kaybolma ve السراط (es-surâṭ) sozunun kesip gecen kilic icin ozel kullanimi. Maḳâyîs bu malzemeleri birbirine yakin verse bile paket yol, yutma ve kilic uygulamalarini ayri tuttugu icin dallar ayri korunur.

quran_note.en: The Quran appendix is an observatory for every occurrence attached to this root envelope. It lists forms, locations, morphology, constructions, and full ayah contexts without assigning any occurrence to a branch.
quran_note.tr: Kur'an eki bu kok zarfina baglanan butun gecisler icin bir gozlem alanidir. Bicimleri, yerleri, morfolojiyi, yapilari ve tam ayet baglamlarini verir; hicbir gecisi bir dala atamaz.

en: All observed occurrences are noun forms of صِرَٰط (ṣirāṭ); that form fact does not by itself activate a branch.
The attachment evidence repeatedly places the noun with adjectives, possessive constructions, and prepositional complements, leaving semantic assignment outside the appendix.
tr: Butun gozlenen gecislerin tumu صِرَٰط (ṣirâṭ) isim bicimleridir; bu bicim olgusu tek basina bir dali etkinlestirmez.
Baglanti kaniti ismi sik sik sifatlarla, tamlama yapilariyla ve edat tamamlayicilariyla gosterir; anlamsal atama ekin disinda kalir.

what_is_ar_transliteration.en: yadkhulu fīhi al-ṣirāṭ wa-al-sirāṭ wa-al-zirāṭ bi-maʿnā al-ṭarīq, wa-khāṣṣatan al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm
what_is_ar_transliteration.tr: yedḫulu fîhi eṣ-ṣirâṭ ve's-sirâṭ ve'z-zirâṭ bi-maʿnâ eṭ-ṭarîḳ, veḫâṣṣaten eṭ-ṭarîḳ el-müstaḳîm

what_is_not_ar_transliteration.en: lā yadkhulu fīhi balʿ al-ṭaʿām wa-lā al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ illā min jihat al-ishtiqāq aw al-ishtirāk fī lafẓ al-sirāṭ ʿinda Maqāyīs
what_is_not_ar_transliteration.tr: lâ yedḫulu fîhi belʿ eṭ-ṭaʿâm velâ es-seyf el-ḳâṭiʿ illâ min cihet el-iştiḳâḳ ev el-iştirâk fî lafẓ es-sirâṭ ʿinde Maḳâyîs

concept.en: This branch names a traversable way: الصراط (al-ṣirāṭ), السراط (al-sirāṭ), and الزراط (al-zirāṭ) are treated as forms for الطريق (al-ṭarīq), with Mufradat narrowing the core image to الطريق المستقيم (al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm). The concept is not merely any direction or moral slogan; it is a road-like course whose defining feature in this branch is straightness and suitability for being followed. Maqayis contributes an ibdāl note and an etymological explanation through س ر ط (s-r-ṭ), but that history does not move swallowing or sword use into the road branch.
concept.tr: Bu dal gecilebilir bir yolu adlandirir: الصراط (eṣ-ṣirâṭ), السراط (es-sirâṭ) ve الزراط (ez-zirâṭ), الطريق (eṭ-ṭarîḳ) icin bicimler olarak verilir; Mufradât cekirdek imgeyi الطريق المستقيم (eṭ-ṭarîḳ el-müstaḳîm) ile daraltir. Kavram yalnizca herhangi bir yon veya ahlaki slogan degil, izlenebilirligi ve dogrulugu one cikan yol benzeri bir hatir. Maḳâyîs ibdâl notu ve س ر ط (s-r-ṭ) uzerinden bir tureme aciklamasi ekler; fakat bu tarih yutma veya kilic kullanimini yol dalinin icine tasimaz.

en: Use of الصراط (al-ṣirāṭ), السراط (al-sirāṭ), and الزراط (al-zirāṭ) as names for a road or path.
The more specific image الطريق المستقيم (al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm), a straight road suitable to be followed.
Variant-form and ibdāl evidence that explains how the ص (ṣ) and س (s) spellings are related in the consulted sources.
tr: الصراط (eṣ-ṣirâṭ), السراط (es-sirâṭ) ve الزراط (ez-zirâṭ) bicimlerinin yol adlari olarak kullanimi.
Izlenmeye elverisli dogru yol imgesi olan الطريق المستقيم (eṭ-ṭarîḳ el-müstaḳîm).
Danisilan kaynaklarda ص (ṣ) ve س (s) yazimlarinin iliskisini aciklayan varyant bicim ve ibdâl kaniti.

en: Swallowing food, disappearance in bodily passage, and width of throat belong to root_000858/B002.
The specialized sword name السراط (al-surāṭ) belongs to root_000858/B003, even though the unvocalized spelling overlaps with the road form.
Generic movement, guidance, or religion-language uses are not branch definitions unless they preserve the road/path boundary supplied here.
tr: Yiyecegi yutma, bedensel geciste kaybolma ve bogaz genisligi root_000858/B002'ye aittir.
Ozel kilic adi السراط (es-surâṭ), harekesiz yazim yol bicimiyle ortusse de root_000858/B003'e aittir.
Genel hareket, hidayet veya dini dil kullanimi, burada verilen yol sinirini korumadikca dal tanimi degildir.

transliteration.en: al-ghayba fī al-murūr wa-al-balʿ
transliteration.tr: el-ğaybe fi'l-murûr ve'l-belʿ

shared_zone.en: Both branches can be explained through passage, and Maqayis connects السراط (al-sirāṭ) etymologically with something disappearing as it passes.
shared_zone.tr: Iki dal da gecis imgesiyle aciklanabilir; Maḳâyîs السراط (es-sirâṭ) sozunu geciste kaybolan seyle tureme bakimindan iliskilendirir.

distinction.en: B001 remains a road to be traversed; B002 is ingestion in which food disappears through swallowing and may extend to easy swallowing or a wide throat.
distinction.tr: B001 gecilen yol olarak kalir; B002 yiyecegin yutularak kayboldugu bedensel gecistir ve kolay yutma veya genis bogaza uzanabilir.

transliteration.en: al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ al-māḍī fī al-ḍarba
transliteration.tr: es-seyf el-ḳâṭiʿ el-mâḍî fi'ḍ-ḍarbe

shared_zone.en: The road and sword uses share the spelling السراط (al-sirāṭ/al-surāṭ) in unvocalized evidence material and both can evoke passage.
shared_zone.tr: Yol ve kilic kullanimlari harekesiz paket malzemesinde السراط (es-sirâṭ/es-surâṭ) yazimini paylasir ve ikisi de gecis imgesi uyandirabilir.

distinction.en: B001 denotes the path itself; B003 denotes a sword characterized by cutting and passing through in a blow. The shared spelling is not enough to merge the referents.
distinction.tr: B001 yolun kendisini adlandirir; B003 darbede kesip gecen kilici adlandirir. Ortak yazim gondergeleri birlestirmeye yetmez.

en.preserves: It keeps the path image and the straightness emphasized by Mufradat and the branch image.
en.loses: It does not display the source's variant spellings or the technical ibdāl note.
en.adds: It adds no separate doctrine, destination, or branch activation claim.
en.collision: Path can be used broadly in English for method or way of life, so the concept account keeps the road-like Arabic boundary visible.

en.preserves: It keeps the concrete road image and straightness very explicitly.
en.loses: Road can sound more physical than the branch may require in abstract contexts.
en.adds: It may add a modern paved-road feel that is not stated by the Arabic evidence.
en.collision: It may hide the ability of الطريق (al-ṭarīq) language to cover a course or way, not only a built road.

en.preserves: It offers a familiar compact orientation toward path or course.
en.loses: It drops straightness and the road image's discipline.
en.adds: It can add method, custom, or sectarian overtones not supplied by the source phrase.
en.collision: Way easily collapses الصراط (al-ṣirāṭ) into many other Arabic words rendered as way.

tr.preserves: Yol imgesini ve Mufradât ile dal imgesinin vurguladigi dogrulugu birlikte korur.
tr.loses: Kaynakta gorunen bicim cesitliligini ve ibdâl notunu tek basina gostermez.
tr.adds: Ayrica mezhep, kurum veya ahiret sahnesi eklemez.
tr.collision: Yol Turkcede cok genistir; TDK yol maddesinin genis alani bu riski gosterir, bu yuzden birincil ifade dogrulugu acikca tasir.

tr.preserves: Yol ve dogruluk boyutlarini dogal Turkceyle verir.
tr.loses: Dosdogru kadar guclu hat/istikamet vurgusu tasimayabilir.
tr.adds: Modern Turkcede ahlaki ogut kalibi gibi duyulabilir.
tr.collision: Yalniz yol dendiginde الصراط (eṣ-ṣirâṭ) ile baska Arapca yol kavramlari ayrilmadan kalir.

tr.preserves: Turkce okurun Arapca kokenli tanima etiketini yakalamasina yardim eder.
tr.loses: Turkcede kullanilan alinti soz dalin yol/duzluk aciklamasini kendi basina vermez.
tr.adds: Tanidik dini ve kulturel cagrisimlar ekleyebilir.
tr.collision: Alinti bicim, kok icindeki yutma ve kilic dallarini degil yalnizca tanidik yol sozunu cagristirabilir.

target_language_note.en: English path is serviceable only when it remains tied to الطريق المستقيم (al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm). The entry therefore treats straight path as primary and keeps road and way as analyzed alternatives rather than letting common translation erase the source's variant-form and boundary evidence.
target_language_note.tr: Turkcede yol dogal ama genis bir karsiliktir; incelenen TDK yol maddesi de bu genisligi gosterir. Bu nedenle birincil karsilik dosdogru yol olarak verilir; sirat tanima etiketi ise alinti sozun cagrisimlari yuzunden ikincildir.

contribution.en: Sihah directly equates the three spellings with the road/path sense.
contribution.tr: Ṣiḥâḥ uc yazimi dogrudan yol anlamiyla esitler.

explanation.en: The quotation supplies the broad road base of the branch before Mufradat's straight-road narrowing.
explanation.tr: Alinti, Mufradât'in dogru yol daraltmasindan once dalin genis yol temelini verir.

analysis.en: This is explicit support for B001 and not evidence for swallowing or sword use; those are separated in the packet despite spelling overlap in the evidence.
analysis.tr: Bu B001 icin acik destektir; yazim ortusmesine ragmen yutma veya kilic kullanimi icin kanit degildir.

contribution.en: Mufradat gives the branch's most compact definition: ṣirāṭ as the straight road.
contribution.tr: Mufradât dalin en yogun tanimini verir: ṣirâṭ dogru yoldur.

explanation.en: Its formulation justifies making straightness prominent in the primary gloss.
explanation.tr: Bu ifade birincil karsilikta dogrulugu one cikarmayi gerekcelendirir.

analysis.en: The same entry also notes سراط (sirāṭ) as a name for it, so it supports both the main form and the variant without reopening the branch boundary.
analysis.tr: Ayni madde سراط (sirâṭ) adini da bildirir; boylece ana bicimi ve varyanti destekler, dal sinirini yeniden tartismaz.

selected_quote_ar: صرط من باب الإبدال وقد ذكر في السين وهو الطريق

quote_transliteration.en: ṣ-r-ṭ min bāb al-ibdāl wa-qad dhukira fī al-sīn wa-huwa al-ṭarīq
quote_transliteration.tr: ṣ-r-ṭ min bâb el-ibdâl veḳad ẕükire fi's-sîn vehuve eṭ-ṭarîḳ

contribution.en: Maqayis confirms the road sense while explaining the ṣād-root as an ibdāl placement related to the sīn entry.
contribution.tr: Maḳâyîs yol anlamini dogrular ve ṣâd kokunu sîn maddesiyle iliskili bir ibdâl yerlesimi olarak aciklar.

explanation.en: This contributes historical organization rather than a separate new road meaning.
explanation.tr: Bu ayri bir yeni yol anlami degil, tarihsel duzenleme katkisi verir.

analysis.en: The source is compatible support because it points back to the sīn material but still states وهو الطريق (wa-huwa al-ṭarīq).
analysis.tr: Kaynak uyumlu destektir; cunku sîn malzemesine geri gonderir ama yine de وهو الطريق (vehuve eṭ-ṭarîḳ) der.

selected_quote_ar: بعض أهل العلم يقول السراط مشتق من ذلك لأن الذاهب فيه يغيب

quote_transliteration.en: baʿḍ ahl al-ʿilm yaqūlu al-sirāṭ mushtaqq min dhālika li-anna al-dhāhib fīhi yaghību
quote_transliteration.tr: baʿḍ ehl el-ʿilm yeḳûlu es-sirâṭ müştaḳḳ min ẕâlike li-enne eẕ-ẕâhib fîhi yağîbu

contribution.en: This source adds an etymological explanation of the road word through disappearance in passage.
contribution.tr: Bu kaynak yol sozune geciste kaybolma uzerinden bir tureme aciklamasi ekler.

explanation.en: The quote explains why the one who goes along the path disappears within it, linking B001 with but not merging it into B002.
explanation.tr: Alinti yolda gidenin onun icinde kaybolmasini aciklar; B001'i B002 ile iliskilendirir ama birlestirmez.

analysis.en: Because the statement is introduced as a report from some scholars, it is used as nuance rather than the main definition of the branch.
analysis.tr: Ifade bazi ilim ehlinin gorusu olarak aktarildigi icin dalin ana tanimi degil ek nualans olarak kullanilir.

source_phrase_transliteration.en: al-ṣirāṭ wa-al-sirāṭ wa-al-zirāṭ: al-ṭarīq; al-ṣirāṭ: al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm; ṣ-r-ṭ min bāb al-ibdāl wa-qad dhukira fī al-sīn wa-huwa al-ṭarīq
source_phrase_transliteration.tr: eṣ-ṣirâṭ ve's-sirâṭ ve'z-zirâṭ: eṭ-ṭarîḳ; eṣ-ṣirâṭ: eṭ-ṭarîḳ el-müstaḳîm; ṣ-r-ṭ min bâb el-ibdâl veḳad ẕükire fi's-sîn vehuve eṭ-ṭarîḳ

source_phrase_transliteration.en: al-ṣirāṭ wa-al-sirāṭ wa-al-zirāṭ: al-ṭarīq; wa-yuqālu lahu sirāṭ; baʿḍ ahl al-ʿilm yaqūlu al-sirāṭ mushtaqq min dhālika li-anna al-dhāhib fīhi yaghīb
source_phrase_transliteration.tr: eṣ-ṣirâṭ ve's-sirâṭ ve'z-zirâṭ: eṭ-ṭarîḳ; ve-yuḳâlu lehu sirâṭ; baʿḍ ehl el-ʿilm yeḳûlu es-sirâṭ müştaḳḳ min ẕâlike li-enne eẕ-ẕâhib fîhi yağîb

meaning.en: الصراط (al-ṣirāṭ) is the main form for the road, especially the straight road.
meaning.tr: الصراط (eṣ-ṣirâṭ), yolun ve ozellikle dogru yolun ana bicimidir.

analysis.en: Sihah gives it in a variant trio, Mufradat defines it by straightness, and Maqayis explains the ṣād spelling through ibdāl.
analysis.tr: Ṣiḥâḥ onu varyant uclusu icinde verir, Mufradât dogrulukla tanimlar, Maḳâyîs ise ṣâd yazimini ibdâl ile aciklar.

meaning.en: السراط (al-sirāṭ) is a road-form variant in this branch, not the sword reading of B003.
meaning.tr: السراط (es-sirâṭ) bu dalda yol bicimi varyantidir; B003'teki kilic okunuşu degildir.

analysis.en: The same unvocalized spelling appears elsewhere, so the branch link is limited to road/path evidence and its etymological note.
analysis.tr: Ayni harekesiz yazim baska yerde de gorundugu icin dal baglantisi yol kaniti ve tureme notuyla sinirlidir.

meaning.en: الزراط (al-zirāṭ) is the zāy-spelled variant reported by Sihah for the road.
meaning.tr: الزراط (ez-zirâṭ), Ṣiḥâḥ'in yol icin aktardigi zayli varyanttir.

analysis.en: No independent swallowing or sword sense is attached to this lexical unit in the evidence.
analysis.tr: Pakette bu sozluk birimine bagli ayri bir yutma veya kilic anlami yoktur.

what_is_ar_transliteration.en: yadkhulu fīhi saraṭa al-ṭaʿām bi-maʿnā balaʿahu wa-ghaybatihi fī al-murūr, wa-mā yattaṣilu bi-suhūlat al-ibtilāʿ wa-saʿat al-ḥalq
what_is_ar_transliteration.tr: yedḫulu fîhi saraṭa eṭ-ṭaʿâm bi-maʿnâ beleʿahu ve-ğaybetihi fi'l-mürûr, ve-mâ yetteṣilu bi-suhûlet el-ibtilâʿ ve-seʿat el-ḥalḳ

what_is_not_ar_transliteration.en: lā yadkhulu fīhi al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm bi-waṣfihi ṭarīqan, wa-lā al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ
what_is_not_ar_transliteration.tr: lâ yedḫulu fîhi eṭ-ṭarîḳ el-müstaḳîm bi-vaṣfihi ṭarîḳan, velâ es-seyf el-ḳâṭiʿ

concept.en: This branch is bodily passage: سرط الطعام (saraṭa al-ṭaʿām) means swallowing food so that it disappears in passage. Maqayis makes غيبة في مر وذهاب (ghayba fī marr wa-dhahāb) the governing image, then explains swallowed food and the easily swallowed sweet السرطراط (al-saraṭrāṭ). The additional السرطم (al-saraṭam) evidence extends the field to a wide throat, with mīm treated as an added letter. The branch is about ingestion and the capacity or ease that makes ingestion possible, not about a road as an object of travel.
concept.tr: Bu dal bedensel gecistir: سرط الطعام (saraṭa eṭ-ṭaʿâm), yiyecegin yutulup geciste kaybolmasidir. Maḳâyîs yonetici imgeyi غيبة في مر وذهاب (ğaybe fî merr ve-ẕehâb) olarak verir, sonra yutulan yiyecegi ve kolay yutulan tatli السرطراط (es-saraṭrâṭ) sozunu aciklar. Ek السرطم (es-saraṭam) kaniti, mîm harfinin ek sayildigi genis bogaz alanina uzanir. Dal, yolculuk nesnesi olarak yol degil, yutma ve yutmayi mumkun kilan kapasite veya kolayliktir.

en: Swallowing food expressed by سرط الطعام (saraṭa al-ṭaʿām).
The disappearance of what is swallowed as it passes inward.
Ease of swallowing, illustrated by السرطراط (al-saraṭrāṭ), and width of throat, illustrated by السرطم (al-saraṭam).
tr: سرط الطعام (saraṭa eṭ-ṭaʿâm) ifadesiyle yiyecegi yutma.
Yutulan seyin ice gecerken kaybolmasi.
السرطراط (es-saraṭrâṭ) ile orneklenen kolay yutulma ve السرطم (es-saraṭam) ile orneklenen bogaz genisligi.

en: The straight road/path branch root_000858/B001, even where Maqayis relates السراط (al-sirāṭ) etymologically to disappearance.
The cutting sword branch root_000858/B003.
General disappearance, digestion, appetite, or consumption not tied to swallowing passage in the supplied evidence.
tr: Maḳâyîs السراط (es-sirâṭ) sozunu tureme bakimindan kaybolmaya baglasa bile root_000858/B001 dogru yol dalidir.
Kesip gecen kilic dali root_000858/B003'tur.
Verilen kanitta yutma gecisine baglanmayan genel kaybolma, sindirim, istah veya tuketim bu dala girmez.

transliteration.en: al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm
transliteration.tr: eṭ-ṭarîḳ el-müstaḳîm

shared_zone.en: Both branches can be linked through the image of passage and disappearance in Maqayis.
shared_zone.tr: Iki dal Maḳâyîs'te gecis ve kaybolma imgesiyle iliskilendirilebilir.

distinction.en: B001 is a path one follows; B002 is a swallowed thing's inward passage and disappearance, plus throat capacity connected to that act.
distinction.tr: B001 izlenen yoldur; B002 yutulan seyin ice gecisi ve kaybolmasi, ayrica bu edime bagli bogaz kapasitesidir.

transliteration.en: al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ al-māḍī fī al-ḍarba
transliteration.tr: es-seyf el-ḳâṭiʿ el-mâḍî fi'ḍ-ḍarbe

shared_zone.en: Both B002 and B003 appear in the same Maqayis sīn-root entry and both involve passage beyond a starting point.
shared_zone.tr: B002 ve B003 ayni Maḳâyîs sîn maddesinde yer alir ve ikisi de baslangic noktasinin otesine gecis icerir.

distinction.en: B002 is ingestion through the throat; B003 is a weapon's cutting passage through a blow. Food and throat are absent from B003, while sword and stroke are absent from B002.
distinction.tr: B002 bogazdan yutmadir; B003 silahin darbede kesip gecmesidir. B003'te yiyecek ve bogaz, B002'de kilic ve darbe yoktur.

en.text: swallowing so that something disappears in passage
en.preserves: It keeps the act of swallowing and the disappearance-through-passage image that Maqayis states.
en.loses: It does not compress the associated easy-swallowing and wide-throat extensions into a single noun.
en.adds: It adds no digestion, appetite, or moral judgment beyond the source evidence.
en.collision: Swallowing alone is too broad; the phrase keeps the distinctive disappearance-in-passage component.

en.text: ingestion by passage into the throat
en.preserves: It keeps bodily intake and throat-directed passage.
en.loses: It weakens the explicit disappearance image and sounds more technical than the source.
en.adds: Ingestion may suggest digestion or nutrition beyond the act of swallowing.
en.collision: It can collide with broader English medical or nutritional uses of ingestion.

en.preserves: It identifies the central physical action.
en.loses: It drops the source's explanation that the swallowed thing vanishes through passage and the related capacity terms.
en.adds: It can include any ordinary swallow, even when no special ease or disappearance image is in view.
en.collision: It can hide the difference between سرط (saraṭa) and other Arabic roots for swallowing or ingesting.

tr.preserves: Yutma edimini ve Maḳâyîs'in belirttigi geciste kaybolma imgesini birlikte korur.
tr.loses: Kolay yutulma ve genis bogaz uzantilarini tek sozcukte toplamiyor.
tr.adds: Sindirim, istah veya deger yargisi eklemez.
tr.collision: Yalniz yutma demek genistir; bu ifade dalin ayirt edici kaybolma boyutunu korur.

tr.preserves: Bedensel gecisi ve yutma edimini dogal Turkceyle verir.
tr.loses: Kaybolma imgesini ve السرطم (es-saraṭam) ile gelen kapasite boyutunu zayiflatir.
tr.adds: Gecirmek sozu bazen zorla yaptirma veya tahammul ettirme cagrisimi tasiyabilir.
tr.collision: Turkcede gecirmek cok genis oldugu icin bedensel yutma siniri acikca tutulmalidir.

tr.preserves: Merkezdeki fiziksel edimi en kisa bicimde tanitir.
tr.loses: Geciste kaybolma, kolay yutulma ve bogaz genisligi boyutlarini dusurur.
tr.adds: Her siradan yutmayi icine alacak kadar genisler.
tr.collision: سرط (saraṭa) ile Arapcadaki baska yutma kokleri arasindaki farki gizleyebilir.

target_language_note.en: English swallowing is recognizable but too small unless the explanation of disappearance in passage is kept. Ingestion is even broader and more technical, so the primary gloss states both the action and the source image.
target_language_note.tr: Turkcede yutma taninir ama geciste kaybolma aciklamasi eklenmezse dal kuculur. Bu yuzden birincil karsilik, hem edimi hem kaynak imgeyi birlikte soyler; yutma tek basina tanima karsiligi olarak kalir.

selected_quote_ar: أصل صحيح واحد يدل على غيبة في مر وذهاب

quote_transliteration.en: aṣl ṣaḥīḥ wāḥid yadullu ʿalā ghayba fī marr wa-dhahāb
quote_transliteration.tr: aṣl ṣaḥîḥ vâḥid yedullu ʿalâ ğaybe fî merr ve-ẕehâb

contribution.en: Maqayis gives the governing semantic image of disappearance in passage and then applies it to swallowing.
contribution.tr: Maḳâyîs geciste kaybolma ana imgesini verir ve sonra bunu yutmaya uygular.

explanation.en: The selected quotation is the branch's conceptual core; the following food and sweet-paste examples instantiate it.
explanation.tr: Secilen alinti dalin kavramsal cekirdegidir; ardindan gelen yiyecek ve tatli ornekleri bunu somutlastirir.

analysis.en: This source explicitly supports B002 while also containing material that the evidence separates into B001 and B003.
analysis.tr: Bu kaynak B002'yi acikca destekler; ayni zamanda paketin B001 ve B003'e ayirdigi malzemeyi de icerir.

selected_quote_ar: السرطم: الواسع الحلق، والميم فيه زائدة، وإنما هو من سرط، إذا بلع

quote_transliteration.en: al-saraṭam: al-wāsiʿ al-ḥalq, wa-al-mīm fīhi zāʾida, wa-innamā huwa min saraṭa, idhā balaʿa
quote_transliteration.tr: es-saraṭam: el-vâsiʿ el-ḥalḳ, ve'l-mîm fîhi zâʾide, ve-innemâ huve min saraṭa, iẕâ beleʿa

contribution.en: The routed variant adds the wide-throated derivative and explains its mīm as extra.
contribution.tr: Yonlendirilmis varyant genis bogazli turevi ekler ve mîm harfini zaid sayar.

explanation.en: It extends the branch from the act of swallowing to the bodily capacity that makes swallowing easy.
explanation.tr: Dali yutma ediminden yutmayi kolaylastiran bedensel kapasiteye genisletir.

analysis.en: This is additional nuance rather than an independent branch: its own text derives the form from سرط (saraṭa) when it means swallowing.
analysis.tr: Bu bagimsiz bir dal degil ek nualanstir; metnin kendisi bicimi yutma anlamindaki سرط (saraṭa) sozunden turetir.

sense_ar_transliteration.en: balaʿa al-ṭaʿām ḥattā ghāba fī al-murūr

source_phrase_transliteration.en: saraṭtu al-ṭaʿāma idhā balaʿtahu li-annahu idhā saraṭa ghāba
source_phrase_transliteration.tr: saraṭtu eṭ-ṭaʿâme iẕâ beleʿtehu li-ennehu iẕâ saraṭa ğâbe

source_phrase_transliteration.en: wa-al-saraṭrāṭ ʿalā fiʿlāl al-fālūdh li-annahu yustaraṭ
source_phrase_transliteration.tr: ve's-saraṭrâṭ ʿalâ fiʿlâl el-fâlûẕ li-ennehu yüstaraṭ

source_phrase_transliteration.en: al-saraṭam: al-wāsiʿ al-ḥalq, wa-al-mīm fīhi zāʾida, wa-innamā huwa min saraṭa, idhā balaʿa
source_phrase_transliteration.tr: es-saraṭam: el-vâsiʿ el-ḥalḳ, ve'l-mîm fîhi zâʾide, ve-innemâ huve min saraṭa, iẕâ beleʿa

meaning.en: سرط الطعام (saraṭa al-ṭaʿām) is the direct swallowing expression: food is swallowed and disappears in passage.
meaning.tr: سرط الطعام (saraṭa eṭ-ṭaʿâm) dogrudan yutma ifadesidir: yiyecek yutulur ve geciste kaybolur.

analysis.en: This lexical unit anchors the branch in an event, not merely in an abstract idea of disappearance.
analysis.tr: Bu sozluk birimi dali yalniz soyut kaybolma fikrine degil bir edime baglar.

meaning.en: السرطراط (al-saraṭrāṭ) is a food item explained by the fact that it is easily swallowed.
meaning.tr: السرطراط (es-saraṭrâṭ), kolay yutulmasiyla aciklanan bir yiyecek adidir.

analysis.en: It contributes the ease-of-swallowing dimension without making the whole branch a food taxonomy.
analysis.tr: Dali yiyecek siniflamasina cevirmeden kolay yutulma boyutunu ekler.

meaning.en: السرطم (al-saraṭam) names a wide-throated person or quality in the routed Maqayis material.
meaning.tr: السرطم (es-saraṭam), yonlendirilmis Maḳâyîs malzemesinde genis bogazli kisi veya niteligi adlandirir.

analysis.en: The source itself explains the mīm as extra and derives the form from swallowing, so it belongs with B002 as a capacity extension.
analysis.tr: Kaynak mîm harfini zaid aciklar ve bicimi yutmadan turetir; bu nedenle B002'ye kapasite uzantisi olarak baglanir.

what_is_ar_transliteration.en: yadkhulu fīhi iṭlāq al-surāṭ ʿalā al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ al-nāfidh al-māḍī fī al-ḍarība
what_is_ar_transliteration.tr: yedḫulu fîhi iṭlâḳ es-surâṭ ʿalâ es-seyf el-ḳâṭiʿ en-nâfiẕ el-mâḍî fi'ḍ-ḍarîbe

what_is_not_ar_transliteration.en: lā yadkhulu fīhi al-ṭarīq, wa-lā balʿ al-ṭaʿām aw saʿat al-ḥalq
what_is_not_ar_transliteration.tr: lâ yedḫulu fîhi eṭ-ṭarîḳ, velâ belʿ eṭ-ṭaʿâm ev seʿat el-ḥalḳ

concept.en: This branch is a specialized weapon use. Maqayis says والسراط السيف القاطع الماضي في الضريبة (wa-al-surāṭ al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ al-māḍī fī al-ḍarība): السراط (al-surāṭ) here is not a road but a cutting sword whose action passes through in the stroke. The branch therefore packages three dimensions: sword, cutting, and effective passage in a blow. It remains connected to the wider Maqayis image of passage, but its referent is a weapon, not a route or a swallowed item.
concept.tr: Bu dal ozel bir silah kullanimidir. Maḳâyîs والسراط السيف القاطع الماضي في الضريبة (ve's-surâṭ es-seyf el-ḳâṭiʿ el-mâḍî fi'ḍ-ḍarîbe) der: Burada السراط (es-surâṭ) yol degil, darbede kesip gecen kilictir. Dal uc boyutu birlestirir: kilic, kesme ve darbede etkili gecis. Maḳâyîs'in genis gecis imgesiyle iliskili kalir; fakat gondergesi rota veya yutulan sey degil silahtir.

en: Use of السراط (al-surāṭ) as a name for a sword.
Cutting force as an indispensable part of the definition.
The sword's passing through in a blow, not merely being sharp in a static way.
tr: السراط (es-surâṭ) sozunun kilic adi olarak kullanilmasi.
Tanimin zorunlu parcasi olan kesme gucu.
Kilic agzinin yalniz duragan keskinligi degil, darbede gecip gitmesi.

en: The road/path sense of الصراط (al-ṣirāṭ) and السراط (al-sirāṭ) in root_000858/B001.
Swallowing, disappearance of food in passage, and width of throat in root_000858/B002.
Generic sword, combat, sharpness, or violence without the source's cutting-and-passing performance.
tr: root_000858/B001'deki الصراط (eṣ-ṣirâṭ) ve السراط (es-sirâṭ) yol anlami.
root_000858/B002'deki yutma, yiyecegin geciste kaybolmasi ve bogaz genisligi.
Kaynakta verilen kesip gecme isi olmaksizin genel kilic, savas, keskinlik veya siddet.

transliteration.en: al-ṭarīq al-mustaqīm
transliteration.tr: eṭ-ṭarîḳ el-müstaḳîm

shared_zone.en: The weapon term and the road term share an unvocalized spelling and a passage image.
shared_zone.tr: Silah terimi ile yol terimi harekesiz yazimi ve gecis imgesini paylasir.

distinction.en: B001 denotes a traversable path; B003 denotes the sword that cuts and passes through in the strike.
distinction.tr: B001 gecilebilir yolu adlandirir; B003 darbede kesip gecen kilici adlandirir.

transliteration.en: al-ghayba fī al-murūr wa-al-balʿ
transliteration.tr: el-ğaybe fi'l-mürûr ve'l-belʿ

shared_zone.en: Both uses are organized in the Maqayis passage/disappearance entry.
shared_zone.tr: Iki kullanim Maḳâyîs'in gecis/kaybolma maddesinde duzenlenir.

distinction.en: B002 is bodily swallowing; B003 is the action of a blade in a blow. The branch boundary turns on the referent and the mode of passage.
distinction.tr: B002 bedensel yutmadir; B003 darbedeki agzin eylemidir. Dal siniri gondergeye ve gecis bicimine dayanir.

en.text: a cutting sword that passes through in the stroke
en.preserves: It keeps sword, cutting, and through-going action in the blow.
en.loses: It cannot reproduce the specialized Arabic noun as one English word.
en.adds: It adds no size, metallurgy, speed, or moral value.
en.collision: Sword alone is too broad, and penetrating sword may shift the action toward thrusting rather than cutting.

en.preserves: It keeps sharp effectiveness and passage through the object struck.
en.loses: It is less transparent than the primary gloss and compresses the blow context.
en.adds: Keen may add a general sharpness or eagerness association.
en.collision: It may be confused with any sharp sword rather than the specific Maqayis expression.

en.loses: It drops the defining cutting and passing-through dimensions.
en.adds: It includes every ordinary sword and figurative sword use.
en.collision: It gives no way to distinguish السراط (al-surāṭ) from other Arabic sword names.

tr.preserves: Kilic gondergesini, kesmeyi ve darbe icindeki gecisi birlikte korur.
tr.loses: Arapcadaki ozel adin tek sozcuk yogunlugunu koruyamaz.
tr.adds: Boy, maden, hiz veya deger yargisi eklemez.
tr.collision: Yalniz kilic cok genistir; nufuz eden kilic ise kesmeden delmeye kayabilir.

tr.preserves: Kesme ve gecme yonunu korur, kilicin etkili agzini belirtir.
tr.loses: Darbe baglamini birincil karsilik kadar acik tutmaz.
tr.adds: Keskin sozu kaynakta ayri bir sifat olarak degil, kesme sonucundan anlasilir.

tr.loses: Dali ayiran kesme ve darbede gecme boyutlarini dusurur.
tr.adds: Her tur genel kilici ve mecaz kilic kullanimlarini kapsar.
tr.collision: السراط (es-surâṭ) sozunu baska Arapca kilic adlarindan ayirmaz.

target_language_note.en: The English primary gloss is deliberately a phrase because sword alone is only a class label. Cutting and passing through in the stroke are the two dimensions that keep this branch from collapsing into generic weapon language.
target_language_note.tr: Turkce birincil karsilik bilerek soz obegi olarak verildi; kilic tek basina yalniz sinif adidir. Kesme ve darbede gecme boyutlari bu dali genel silah dilinden ayirir.

selected_quote_ar: والسراط السيف القاطع الماضي في الضريبة

quote_transliteration.en: wa-al-surāṭ al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ al-māḍī fī al-ḍarība

contribution.en: Within the supplied branch source roster, Maqayis alone supplies the specialized sword expression.
contribution.tr: Saglanan dal kaynak listesinde ozel kilic ifadesini yalniz Maḳâyîs verir.

explanation.en: The quote explicitly identifies the referent as a sword and defines its performance as cutting and passing through in the blow.
explanation.tr: Alinti gondergeyi acikca kilic olarak belirler ve isini darbede kesip gecmek diye tanimlar.

analysis.en: Sole attestation is a statement about the supplied branch source roster, not doubt about the frozen branch. The same Maqayis entry also contains road and swallowing material, but the explicit sword equation warrants a separate branch.
analysis.tr: Tek taniklik, dondurulmus dal hakkinda kusku degil, saglanan kaynak listesi hakkinda bir tespittir. Ayni Maḳâyîs maddesinde yol ve yutma malzemesi de vardir; fakat acik kilic esitligi ayri dali gerekcelendirir.

source_phrase_transliteration.en: wa-al-surāṭ al-sayf al-qāṭiʿ al-māḍī fī al-ḍarība

meaning.en: السراط (al-surāṭ) is the specialized sword name in this branch.
meaning.tr: السراط (es-surâṭ) bu daldaki ozel kilic adidir.

analysis.en: Its branch meaning depends on the Maqayis quotation; it should not be read back as the road-form السراط (al-sirāṭ) in B001.
analysis.tr: Dal anlami Maḳâyîs alintisina dayanir; B001'deki yol bicimi السراط (es-sirâṭ) olarak geri okunmamalidir.

transliteration.en: ihdinā al-ṣirāṭa al-mustaqīma
transliteration.tr: ihdinâ eṣ-ṣirâṭa el-müstaḳîma

transliteration.en: ṣirāṭa alladhīna anʿamta ʿalayhim ghayri al-maghḍūbi ʿalayhim wa-lā al-ḍāllīna
transliteration.tr: ṣirâṭa elleẕîne enʿamte ʿaleyhim ğayri el-mağḍûbi ʿaleyhim ve-lâ eḍ-ḍâllîne

transliteration.en: sayaqūlu al-sufahāʾu mina al-nāsi mā wallāhum ʿan qiblatihimu allatī kānū ʿalayhā qul lillāhi al-mashriqu wa-al-maghribu yahdī man yashāʾu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: seyeḳûlu es-sufehâʾu mine en-nâsi mâ vellâhum ʿan ḳıbletihimü elletî kânû ʿaleyhâ ḳul lillâhi el-meşriḳu ve'l-mağribu yehdî men yeşâʾu ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: kāna al-nāsu ummatan wāḥidatan fa-baʿatha allāhu al-nabiyyīna mubashshirīna wa-mundhirīna wa-anzala maʿahumu al-kitāba bi-al-ḥaqqi li-yaḥkuma bayna al-nāsi fīmā ikhtalafū fīhi wa-mā ikhtalafa fīhi illā alladhīna ūtūhu min baʿdi mā jāʾathumu al-bayyinātu baghyan baynahum fa-hadā allāhu alladhīna āmanū li-mā ikhtalafū fīhi mina al-ḥaqqi bi-idhnihi wa-allāhu yahdī man yashāʾu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: kâne en-nâsu ümmeten vâḥideten fe-beʿase allâhu en-nebiyyîne mübeşşirîne ve-münẕirîne ve-enzela maʿahumü el-kitâbe bi'l-ḥaḳḳi li-yeḥküme beyne en-nâsi fîmâ iḫtelefû fîhi ve-mâ iḫtelefe fîhi illâ elleẕîne ûtûhu min baʿdi mâ câʾethumü el-beyyinâtü bağyen beynehum fe-hedâ allâhu elleẕîne âmenû li-mâ iḫtelefû fîhi mine el-ḥaḳḳi bi-iẕnihi ve-allâhu yehdî men yeşâʾu ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: inna allāha rabbī wa-rabbukum fa-uʿbudūhu hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
transliteration.tr: inne allâhe rabbî ve-rabbüküm fe-uʿbüdûhu hâẕâ ṣirâṭun müstaḳîmün

transliteration.en: wa-kayfa takfurūna wa-antum tutlā ʿalaykum āyātu allāhi wa-fīkum rasūluhu wa-man yaʿtaṣim bi-allāhi fa-qad hudiya ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-keyfe tekfürûne ve-entüm tütlâ ʿaleyküm âyâtü allâhi ve-fîküm rasûluhu ve-men yaʿteṣim bi-allâhi fe-ḳad hüdiye ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-la-hadaynāhum ṣirāṭan mustaqīman
transliteration.tr: ve-le-hedâynâhum ṣirâṭan müstaḳîmen

transliteration.en: fa-ammā alladhīna āmanū bi-allāhi wa-iʿtaṣamū bihi fa-sa-yudkhiluhum fī raḥmatin minhu wa-faḍlin wa-yahdīhim ilayhi ṣirāṭan mustaqīman
transliteration.tr: fe-emmâ elleẕîne âmenû bi-allâhi ve-iʿteṣamû bihi fe-se-yüdḫilühüm fî raḥmetin minhu ve-faḍlin ve-yehdîhim ileyhi ṣirâṭan müstaḳîmen

transliteration.en: yahdī bihi allāhu mani ittabaʿa riḍwānahu subula al-salāmi wa-yukhrijuhum mina al-ẓulumāti ilā al-nūri bi-idhnihi wa-yahdīhim ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: yehdî bihi allâhu meni ittebeʿa riḍvânehu sübüle es-selâmi ve-yüḫricühüm mine eẓ-ẓulümâti ilâ en-nûri bi-iẕnihi ve-yehdîhim ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-alladhīna kadhdhabū bi-āyātinā ṣummun wa-bukmun fī al-ẓulumāti man yashaʾi allāhu yuḍlilhu wa-man yashaʾ yajʿalhu ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-elleẕîne keẕẕebû bi-âyâtinâ ṣummün ve-bükmün fî eẓ-ẓulümâti men yeşaʾi allâhu yüḍlilhu ve-men yeşaʾ yecʿalhu ʿalâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-min ābāʾihim wa-dhurriyyātihim wa-ikhwānihim wa-ijtabaynāhum wa-hadaynāhum ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-min âbâʾihim ve-ẕürriyyâtihim ve-iḫvânihim ve-ictebeynâhum ve-hedâynâhum ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-hādhā ṣirāṭu rabbika mustaqīman qad faṣṣalnā al-āyāti li-qawmin yadhdhakkarūna
transliteration.tr: ve-hâẕâ ṣirâṭu rabbike müstaḳîmen ḳad faṣṣalnâ el-âyâti li-ḳavmin yeẕẕekkerûne

transliteration.en: wa-anna hādhā ṣirāṭī mustaqīman fa-ittabiʿūhu wa-lā tattabiʿū al-subula fa-tafarraqa bikum ʿan sabīlihi dhālikum waṣṣākum bihi laʿallakum tattaqūna
transliteration.tr: ve-enne hâẕâ ṣirâṭî müstaḳîmen fe-ittebiʿûhu ve-lâ tettebiʿû es-sübüle fe-teferraḳa biküm ʿan sebîlihi ẕâliküm vaṣṣâküm bihi leʿalleküm tetteḳûne

transliteration.en: qul innanī hadānī rabbī ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin dīnan qiyaman millata ibrāhīma ḥanīfan wa-mā kāna mina al-mushrikīna
transliteration.tr: ḳul innenî hedânî rabbî ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin dînen ḳiyemen millete ibrâhîme ḥanîfen ve-mâ kâne mine el-müşrikîne

transliteration.en: qāla fa-bi-mā aghwaytanī la-aqʿudanna lahum ṣirāṭaka al-mustaqīma
transliteration.tr: ḳâle fe-bi-mâ ağveytenî le-aḳʿudenne lehüm ṣirâṭeke el-müstaḳîme

transliteration.en: wa-lā taqʿudū bi-kulli ṣirāṭin tūʿidūna wa-taṣuddūna ʿan sabīli allāhi man āmana bihi wa-tabghūnahā ʿiwajan wa-udhkurū idh kuntum qalīlan fa-kaththarakum wa-unẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu al-mufsidīna
transliteration.tr: ve-lâ taḳʿudû bi-külli ṣirâṭin tûʿidûne ve-teṣuddûne ʿan sebîli allâhi men âmene bihi ve-tebğûnehâ ʿivecen ve-uẕkürû iẕ küntüm ḳalîlen fe-kessereküm ve-unẓurû keyfe kâne ʿâḳibetü el-müfsidîne

transliteration.en: wa-allāhu yadʿū ilā dāri al-salāmi wa-yahdī man yashāʾu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-allâhu yedʿû ilâ dâri es-selâmi ve-yehdî men yeşâʾu ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: innī tawakkaltu ʿalā allāhi rabbī wa-rabbikum mā min dābbatin illā huwa ākhidhun bi-nāṣiyatihā inna rabbī ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: innî tevekkeltü ʿalâ allâhi rabbî ve-rabbiküm mâ min dâbbetin illâ huve âḫiẕun bi-nâṣiyetihâ inne rabbî ʿalâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: alif lām rā kitābun anzalnāhu ilayka li-tukhrija al-nāsa mina al-ẓulumāti ilā al-nūri bi-idhni rabbihim ilā ṣirāṭi al-ʿazīzi al-ḥamīdi
transliteration.tr: elif lâm râ kitâbün enzelnâhu ileyke li-tüḫrice en-nâse mine eẓ-ẓulümâti ilâ en-nûri bi-iẕni rabbihim ilâ ṣirâṭi el-ʿazîzi el-ḥamîdi

transliteration.en: qāla hādhā ṣirāṭun ʿalayya mustaqīmun
transliteration.tr: ḳâle hâẕâ ṣirâṭun ʿaleyye müstaḳîmün

transliteration.en: wa-ḍaraba allāhu mathalan rajulayni aḥaduhumā abkamu lā yaqdiru ʿalā shayʾin wa-huwa kallun ʿalā mawlāhu aynamā yuwajjihhu lā yaʾti bi-khayrin hal yastawī huwa wa-man yaʾmuru bi-al-ʿadli wa-huwa ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-ḍarabe allâhu meselen racüleyni eḥadühümâ ebkemü lâ yaḳdiru ʿalâ şeyʾin ve-huve kellün ʿalâ mevlâhu eynemâ yüveccihhu lâ yeʾti bi-ḫayrin hel yestevî huve ve-men yeʾmuru bi'l-ʿadli ve-huve ʿalâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: shākiran li-anʿumihi ijtabāhu wa-hadāhu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: şâkiren li-enʿumihi ictebâhu ve-hedâhu ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-inna allāha rabbī wa-rabbukum fa-uʿbudūhu hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
transliteration.tr: ve-inne allâhe rabbî ve-rabbüküm fe-uʿbüdûhu hâẕâ ṣirâṭun müstaḳîmün

transliteration.en: yā abati innī qad jāʾanī mina al-ʿilmi mā lam yaʾtika fa-ittabiʿnī ahdika ṣirāṭan sawiyyan
transliteration.tr: yâ ebeti innî ḳad câʾenî mine el-ʿilmi mâ lem yeʾtike fe-ittebiʿnî ehdike ṣirâṭan seviyyen

transliteration.en: qul kullun mutarabbiṣun fa-tarabbaṣū fa-sa-taʿlamūna man aṣḥābu al-ṣirāṭi al-sawiyyi wa-mani ihtadā
transliteration.tr: ḳul küllün müterabbiṣun fe-terabbaṣû fe-se-taʿlemûne men aṣḥâbü eṣ-ṣirâṭi es-seviyyî ve-meni ihtedâ

transliteration.en: wa-hudū ilā al-ṭayyibi mina al-qawli wa-hudū ilā ṣirāṭi al-ḥamīdi
transliteration.tr: ve-hüdû ilâ eṭ-ṭayyibi mine el-ḳavli ve-hüdû ilâ ṣirâṭi el-ḥamîdi

transliteration.en: wa-li-yaʿlama alladhīna ūtū al-ʿilma annahu al-ḥaqqu min rabbika fa-yuʾminū bihi fa-tukhbita lahu qulūbuhum wa-inna allāha la-hādi alladhīna āmanū ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-li-yaʿleme elleẕîne ûtû el-ʿilme ennehu el-ḥaḳḳu min rabbike fe-yüʾminû bihi fe-tuḫbite lehu ḳulûbühüm ve-inne allâhe le-hâdi elleẕîne âmenû ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-innaka la-tadʿūhum ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-inneke le-tedʿûhüm ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-inna alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bi-al-ākhirati ʿani al-ṣirāṭi la-nākibūna
transliteration.tr: ve-inne elleẕîne lâ yüʾminûne bi'l-âḫireti ʿani eṣ-ṣirâṭi le-nâkibûne

transliteration.en: laqad anzalnā āyātin mubayyinātin wa-allāhu yahdī man yashāʾu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: leḳad enzelnâ âyâtin mübeyyinâtin ve-allâhu yehdî men yeşâʾu ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-yarā alladhīna ūtū al-ʿilma alladhī unzila ilayka min rabbika huwa al-ḥaqqa wa-yahdī ilā ṣirāṭi al-ʿazīzi al-ḥamīdi
transliteration.tr: ve-yerâ elleẕîne ûtû el-ʿilme elleẕî ünzile ileyke min rabbike huve el-ḥaḳḳa ve-yehdî ilâ ṣirâṭi el-ʿazîzi el-ḥamîdi

transliteration.en: ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ʿalâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-ani uʿbudūnī hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
transliteration.tr: ve-eni uʿbüdûnî hâẕâ ṣirâṭun müstaḳîmün

transliteration.en: wa-law nashāʾu la-ṭamasnā ʿalā aʿyunihim fa-istabaqū al-ṣirāṭa fa-annā yubṣirūna
transliteration.tr: ve-lev neşâʾu le-ṭamesnâ ʿalâ aʿyunihim fe-istebeḳû eṣ-ṣirâṭa fe-ennâ yubṣirûne

transliteration.en: min dūni allāhi fa-ihdūhum ilā ṣirāṭi al-jaḥīmi
transliteration.tr: min dûni allâhi fe-ihdûhüm ilâ ṣirâṭi el-ceḥîmi

transliteration.en: wa-hadaynāhumā al-ṣirāṭa al-mustaqīma
transliteration.tr: ve-hedâynâhümâ eṣ-ṣirâṭa el-müstaḳîme

transliteration.en: idh dakhalū ʿalā dāwūda fa-faziʿa minhum qālū lā takhaf khaṣmāni baghā baʿḍunā ʿalā baʿḍin fa-uḥkum baynanā bi-al-ḥaqqi wa-lā tushṭiṭ wa-ihdinā ilā sawāʾi al-ṣirāṭi
transliteration.tr: iẕ deḫalû ʿalâ dâvûde fe-feziʿa minhüm ḳâlû lâ teḫaf ḫaṣmâni bağâ baʿḍunâ ʿalâ baʿḍin fe-uḥküm beynenâ bi'l-ḥaḳḳi ve-lâ tüşṭiṭ ve-ihdinâ ilâ sevâʾi eṣ-ṣirâṭi

transliteration.en: wa-kadhālika awḥaynā ilayka rūḥan min amrinā mā kunta tadrī mā al-kitābu wa-lā al-īmānu wa-lākin jaʿalnāhu nūran nahdī bihi man nashāʾu min ʿibādinā wa-innaka la-tahdī ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: ve-keẕâlike evḥaynâ ileyke rûḥan min emrinâ mâ künte tedrî mâ el-kitâbü ve-lâ el-îmânü ve-lâkin ceʿalnâhu nûren nehdî bihi men neşâʾu min ʿibâdinâ ve-inneke le-tehdî ilâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: ṣirāṭi allāhi alladhī lahu mā fī al-samāwāti wa-mā fī al-arḍi alā ilā allāhi taṣīru al-umūru
transliteration.tr: ṣirâṭi allâhi elleẕî lehu mâ fî es-semâvâti ve-mâ fî el-arḍi elâ ilâ allâhi teṣîru el-umûru

transliteration.en: fa-istamsik bi-alladhī ūḥiya ilayka innaka ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: fe-istemsik bi-elleẕî ûḥiye ileyke inneke ʿalâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin

transliteration.en: wa-innahu la-ʿilmun li-al-sāʿati fa-lā tamtarunna bihā wa-ittabiʿūni hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
transliteration.tr: ve-innehu le-ʿilmün li's-sâʿati fe-lâ temterunne bihâ ve-ittebiʿûni hâẕâ ṣirâṭun müstaḳîmün

transliteration.en: inna allāha huwa rabbī wa-rabbukum fa-uʿbudūhu hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
transliteration.tr: inne allâhe huve rabbî ve-rabbüküm fe-uʿbüdûhu hâẕâ ṣirâṭun müstaḳîmün

transliteration.en: li-yaghfira laka allāhu mā taqaddama min dhanbika wa-mā taʾakhkhara wa-yutimma niʿmatahu ʿalayka wa-yahdiyaka ṣirāṭan mustaqīman
transliteration.tr: li-yağfire leke allâhu mâ teḳaddeme min ẕenbike ve-mâ teʾaḫḫara ve-yütimme niʿmetehu ʿaleyke ve-yehdiyeke ṣirâṭan müstaḳîmen

transliteration.en: waʿadakumu allāhu maghānima kathīratan taʾkhudhūnahā fa-ʿajjala lakum hādhihi wa-kaffa aydiya al-nāsi ʿankum wa-li-takūna āyatan li-al-muʾminīna wa-yahdiyakum ṣirāṭan mustaqīman
transliteration.tr: veʿadekümü allâhu meğânime kesîreten teʾḫuẕûnehâ fe-ʿaccele leküm hâẕihi ve-keffe eydiye en-nâsi ʿanküm ve-li-tekûne âyeten li'l-müʾminîne ve-yehdiyeküm ṣirâṭan müstaḳîmen

transliteration.en: a-fa-man yamshī mukibban ʿalā wajhihi ahdā am-man yamshī sawiyyan ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
transliteration.tr: e-fe-men yemşî mükibben ʿalâ vechihi ehdâ em-men yemşî seviyyen ʿalâ ṣirâṭin müstaḳîmin
